novel_features.name: Cross-org health audit
novel_features.description: Find stale targets, orphaned resources, and missing role bindings across every org you administer, in one command.

novel_features.name: Certificate expiry watch
novel_features.description: List certificates sorted by days-until-expiry across every org, with a configurable warning window.

novel_features.name: Full config backup
novel_features.description: Export the complete Pangolin configuration — orgs, sites, resources, targets, roles, IdPs — as version-controllable JSON.

novel_features.name: Config restore from backup
novel_features.description: Re-apply a backup against a fresh Pangolin install, in the correct dependency order, with dry-run preview.

novel_features.name: Access graph
novel_features.description: Answer 'who can reach what' by joining users, roles, resources, and orgs into one queryable view.

novel_features.name: One-shot expose
novel_features.description: Create site (if needed), create resource, attach target, bind a role — in one command, with dry-run preview.

novel_features.name: Doctor with base-URL discovery
novel_features.description: Validate auth, probe both /v1 and /api/v1 mount paths, and report the working integration-API base URL with environment-variable guidance.
